title: Section 23
content: 1[23. Decision of Central Government final respecting certain matters.--If, for the purposes of this Act, any question arises as to whether-- (a) there has been a substantial expansion of an industrial undertaking, or (b) an industrial undertaking is producing or manufacturing any new article, the decision of the Central Government thereon shall be final.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 26 of 1953, s. 14, for section 23 (w.e.f. 1-10-1953)
